Questions in Surveys Regarding Extremist Activity in the Workplace, , , as amended by , , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–92, div. A, title V, § 593133 Stat. 1415Pub. L. 116–283, div. A, title V, § 553134 Stat. 3633Dec. 20, 2019Jan. 1, 2021“(a).—Questions RequiredThe Secretary of Defense shall include in appropriate surveys administered by the Department of Defense questions regarding whether respondents have ever—“(1)experienced or witnessed extremist, racist, anti-Semitic, or supremacist activity in the workplace; or“(2)reported such activity.“(b).—BriefingNot later than , the Secretary shall provide to the Committees on Armed Services of the Senate and the House of Representatives a briefing including—March 1, 2021“(1)the text of the questions included in surveys under subsection (a); and“(2)which surveys include such questions.”
